scripts.lint:dashboard: biome check src/token_machine/dashboard/assets/ts scripts/check-dashboard-build.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.format:dashboard: biome format --write src/token_machine/dashboard/assets/ts scripts/check-dashboard-build.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.check:dashboard: pnpm lint:dashboard && pnpm typecheck && node scripts/check-dashboard-build.mjs
